ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: FA8818 ASSRD ACS TO SPC SSC/AAK-KT

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SRP-4 AWARD TO ORBITAL ATK, INC. PART OF MULTIPLE AWARD IDIQ WITH $424M CEILING

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: GUIDED MISSILE AND SPACE VEHICLE MANUFACTURING

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
